title: Nova generator
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''nova generator''' was a type of weapon that existed in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] during the reign of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. They were usually employed in isolated regions of [[Realspace/Legends|space]], such as the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].
